extortion.description: Jordan Drug, Inc. currently operates seven independent pharmacies across eastern Kentucky. The Jordan Drug Family Stores include Village Apothecary and Stufflebean Pharmacy in Beattyville, Owsley Prescription Center in Booneville, Wolfe Prescription Center in Campton, Powell Prescription Center in Clay City, Jackson Apothecary in Jackson, and Clinic Pharmacy in Salyersville. Jordan Medical, LLC was established by Luther and Rosemary Smith in September of 2005 to serve patients in central and eastern Kentucky already being served by Jordan Drug, Inc. with respect to their durable medical needs. Jordan Medical’s retail showroom is located at 1075 Hwy 11 North in Beattyville, Kentucky, in the same building as the corporate office of Jordan Drug, Inc
